name: RETINAL ASTROCYTOMA
definition: RETINAL ASTROCYTIC HAMARTOMA low-grade benign neoplasm / hamartoma arising from the nerve fiber layer of retina / optic

demographics.Path: usually multiple + bilateral in tuberous sclerosis;
demographics.Histo: spindle-shaped fibrous astrocytes with small oval nuclei
demographics.Location: retina near optic disc; bilateral in 25%

distribution: retina near optic disc; bilateral in 25%

clinical.Cx: (1)  Central retinal vein occlusion + secondary hemorrhage
